name: RebarSpacing.ExcludeTypeEnum
summary: The different ways to exclude reinforcing bars from the spacing.

enum_values.name: EXCLUDE_TYPE_NONE
enum_values.summary: All the reinforcing bars are included.

enum_values.name: EXCLUDE_TYPE_FIRST
enum_values.summary: The first reinforcing bar is not to be created to the spacing.

enum_values.name: EXCLUDE_TYPE_LAST
enum_values.summary: The last reinforcing bar is not to be created to the spacing.

enum_values.name: EXCLUDE_TYPE_BOTH
enum_values.summary: The first and last reinforcing bars are not to be created to the spacing.
